Description: regreSSHion: signal-handler race condition in OpenSSH sshd allows unauthenticated remote code execution as root on glibc-based Linux.
Remote code execution in ssh-agent PKCS#11 forwarding via a crafted agent-forwarding request.
OS command injection via ProxyCommand when an untrusted user/hostname contains shell metacharacters.
X.509 email address 4-byte stack buffer overflow during punycode decoding of a crafted certificate.
X.509 email address variable-length buffer overflow in punycode decoding, causing denial of service.
X.400 address type confusion in X.509 GeneralName allows reading/writing arbitrary memory.
Heartbleed: TLS heartbeat over-read discloses up to 64KB of process memory including private keys.
Padding-oracle in AES-NI CBC MAC check allows a MITM to decrypt TLS traffic (Lucky-13 variant).
Shellshock: bash evaluates trailing code in exported function definitions, enabling remote code execution via env vars.
Incomplete Shellshock fix still allows crafted environment variables to write files / execute code.
Local privilege drop bypass: setuid bash can regain dropped privileges via enable -f loadable builtins.
Looney Tunables: buffer overflow in the glibc dynamic loader GLIBC_TUNABLES handling enables local root.
Out-of-bounds write in the glibc ISO-2022-CN-EXT iconv conversion module.
Stack-based buffer overflow in getaddrinfo() dual A/AAAA lookups allows remote code execution.
URL parsing confusion in wget lets an attacker redirect downloads to an attacker-controlled host.
SOCKS5 heap buffer overflow in curl when a hostname longer than 255 bytes is passed to a slow proxy.
TELNET option IAC injection in curl allows sending unintended data to the server.
Usage of disabled protocol: curl may still use a protocol the app tried to disable via CURLOPT_PROTOCOLS.
Heap buffer overflow in libxml2 XML parser allows remote code execution via a crafted document.
Integer overflow in libxml2 with XML_PARSE_HUGE leads to out-of-bounds writes.
Malformed UTF-8 in libexpat allows out-of-bounds writes and possible remote code execution.
libexpat mishandles a negative len passed to XML_ParseBuffer, causing memory corruption.
Heap buffer over-read/overflow in zlib inflate() via a large gzip header extra field.
Memory corruption in zlib deflate() when compressing with a specific memLevel/window configuration.
Baron Samedit: heap buffer overflow in sudoedit argument parsing enables local privilege escalation to root.
sudoedit lets a user edit arbitrary files via a crafted EDITOR/VISUAL containing extra arguments.
PwnKit: out-of-bounds write in pkexec argument handling gives any local user root.
Uncontrolled alloca() on a long mount unit path lets a local attacker crash systemd (PID 1) via stack exhaustion.
Heap buffer overflow in SQLite sessions extension sessionfuzz via a crafted database.
MIT krb5 GSS message-token length handling flaw allows tampering with confidential message data.
Side-channel in GnuTLS ECDSA nonce generation leaks bits of the private key (Minerva-style).
Log4Shell: JNDI lookup substitution in logged strings enables unauthenticated remote code execution.
Incomplete Log4Shell fix still allows RCE / DoS via Thread Context Map lookups in certain configurations.
Java StackOverflow / DoS in jackson-databind via deeply nested JSON arrays during deserialization.
Spring4Shell: data-binding on Class objects allows remote code execution on JDK 9+ with a WAR deploy.
SnakeYAML Constructor allows arbitrary object deserialization leading to remote code execution.
requests Session reuses a verify=False setting for later requests to the same host, silently skipping TLS verification.
requests leaks the Proxy-Authorization header to the destination server on HTTPS redirect.
urllib3 does not strip the request body when a 303 redirect changes the method to GET, leaking data.
urllib3 forwards Proxy-Authorization to the target host across a cross-origin redirect.
Denial of service in Django intcomma template filter via very long inputs.
Regular-expression denial of service in Django Truncator.words / urlize on long HTML inputs.
Flask may cache and cross-serve a response containing a session cookie to the wrong client behind a proxy.
Jinja2 xmlattr filter allows HTML attribute injection / XSS via crafted attribute keys.
Jinja2 |attr filter sandbox bypass allows access to unintended Python attributes.
NULL-pointer dereference in pyca/cryptography when loading a PKCS7 certificate, causing a crash.
pyca/cryptography NULL dereference when a PKCS12 file has a certificate but no private key.
Werkzeug interactive debugger PIN can be brute-forced remotely, enabling code execution on a debug server.
Werkzeug multipart parser exhausts CPU on a crafted upload, causing denial of service.
Remote code execution in setuptools package_index via a malicious URL passed to easy_install/download.
Regular-expression denial of service in setuptools package_index HTML parsing.
Pillow ImageMath.eval allows arbitrary code execution via crafted environment keys.
Buffer overflow in Pillow _imagingcms.c via strcpy on a long ICC profile name.
Directory traversal in aiohttp static file handler when follow_symlinks is enabled.
Arbitrary code execution in PyYAML full_load / FullLoader via crafted YAML tags.
certifi bundled the compromised e-Tugra root CA; removed to prevent trusting mis-issued certificates.
Command injection in lodash template via a crafted options.sourceURL / property path.
Prototype pollution in minimist allows overwriting Object.prototype via crafted --__proto__ arguments.
axios leaks the XSRF-TOKEN in the X-XSRF-TOKEN header to third-party hosts on cross-site redirects.
follow-redirects (via axios) leaks the Proxy-Authorization header across hosts on redirect.
Regular-expression denial of service in the node-semver range parser via crafted version strings.
Denial of service in the ws WebSocket library via a request with many HTTP headers.
node-tar denial of service via memory exhaustion when extracting a crafted tar archive.
